monster.name: LordMalebranche

trait.name: Magic Resistance
trait.text: advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects

trait.name: Corrupt Will
trait.text: when Malebranche deals necrotic damage, he regains temporary HP equal to half the damage dealt

trait.name: Legendary Actions (3/round)
trait.text: Malebranche can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the following. Only one at a time, at the end of another creature's turn.

trait.name: Rapid Summoning (2 actions)
trait.text: summons 1d4 skeletons (CR 1/4) in unoccupied spaces within 9m / 30ft

trait.name: Life Drain (1 action)
trait.text: a creature within 9m / 30ft must succeed on a Constitution save DC 17 or take 2d8 necrotic damage. Malebranche regains HP equal to the damage dealt.

monster.description: Corrupt governor of Orcastle, Lord Malebranche is a thin, pale man with sunken eyes that seem to calculate the value of every person in the room. He wears dark noble garments with silver embroidery. His hands are always cold — a side effect of the necromantic magic he practices. Distinctive trait: he speaks with impeccable courtesy even when ordering atrocities. He never raises his voice. His calm is more unsettling than any threat. Role: main antagonist
